summary: ProductDashboard themed layout testing completed. All 4 tested product dashboards (RetailPro, Expenses, Loyalty, UniTxt) are loading correctly with their respective themes and ProductDashboard layout.

issues: Some icons appear as empty boxes (pre-existing font loading issue from previous iterations)

retailpro.details: RetailPro dashboard loads with dark green theme. All components visible: Update card, Net Income, Total Return, Stats cards (Today's Sales, Orders Today, Customers, Products), Transaction list, Revenue chart ($193,000.00 +35%), Total View Performance (565K), Sales Report, Promotional card

expenses.details: Expenses dashboard loads with red theme. 'Add Expense' button visible. Stats: Today's Expenses ($1,250.00), Pending Approval (12), This Month ($15,840.00), Categories (8). Transaction list shows expense-specific items: Office Supplies, Travel Expense, Utility Bills, Marketing, Equipment. Sales Report shows: Total Expenses (233), Pending Approval (23), Approved (482). Promo: 'Automate your expense tracking today.'

loyalty.details: Loyalty dashboard loads with pink theme. 'Add Member' button visible. Stats: Active Members (482), Points Issued (23,400), Rewards Redeemed (156), VIP Members (24). Transaction list shows loyalty-specific items: Points Earned - John D., Reward Redeemed, New Member Signup, Tier Upgrade - Gold, Birthday Bonus. Sales Report shows: Points Issued (23300), Points Redeemed (2300). Promo: 'Grow customer loyalty with smart rewards.'

unitxt.details: UniTxt dashboard loads with amber/orange theme. 'New Message' button visible. Stats: Messages Sent (12,450), Delivery Rate (95%), Contacts (3,542), Credits Left (5,000). Transaction list shows unitxt-specific items: Campaign Sent, SMS Delivered, Message Failed, Credits Purchased, New Template. Sales Report shows: Messages Sent (2330), Messages Pending (23). Promo: 'Reach more customers with SMS marketing.'

navigation_results.direct_url_navigation: PASS - All product dashboards are accessible via direct URL (/expenses, /loyalty, /unitxt, /dashboard)
navigation_results.sidebar_navigation: PARTIAL - Clicking Expenses/Loyalty from sidebar shows promotional modal instead of direct navigation. This appears to be intentional behavior for 'Available Apps' section that prompts users to start free trial.

critical_code_review_comments: ProductDashboard component correctly implements PRODUCT_THEMES with all 7 products defined
Each product page (expenses, loyalty, unitxt) correctly passes productId prop to ProductDashboard
Theme colors are applied dynamically via PRODUCT_THEMES lookup
Default transaction data and sales report data are correctly customized per product
MOCKED: Stats and transaction data use placeholder/default values - not fetched from backend API
seed_data_creation: ProductDashboard uses default/mock data defined in getDefaultTransactions() and getDefaultSalesReport() functions
mocked_api_note: Transaction lists and stats in ProductDashboard use default mock data. Stats cards use placeholder values (e.g., Today's Expenses $1,250.00, Active Members 482, Messages Sent 12,450)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProductDashboard themed layout implementation is complete. All 4 tested products (RetailPro, Expenses, Loyalty, UniTxt) display correctly with their specific themes. The component supports 7 different product themes defined in PRODUCT_THEMES object. Each product page passes the productId prop which drives the theme selection. Inventory, Invoicing, and KwikPay products were not explicitly tested but have themes defined in the component.
